cases.name: Voice + Photo: Pump Leak (French)

input.raw_voice_text: Il y a une fuite d'huile importante sur la pompe centrifuge PMP-003 dans la zone de broyage. La garniture mécanique semble endommagée.

checks: Equipment TAG PMP-003 resolved via EXACT_MATCH
Failure mode is a valid 72-combo pair involving WEARS mechanism
Work order type is PM03 (active leak = corrective)
Priority is EMERGENCY or URGENT (pump leak in crushing zone)
LOCKOUT_TAGOUT safety flag present (rotating equipment)
At least 1 spare part suggested (mechanical seal — T-16 rule)
Structured description <= 72 characters
Status is DRAFT

cases.name: Text: Motor Vibration (English)

Structured description <= 72 characters
